onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Import active inventory with preview validation, duplicate detection, and reconciliation before go-live.
onboarding.importInstructionsBody: Use the template headers exactly. `payerId` or `payerName` must match one of the configured payer profiles. Canada metadata columns are optional and can be used once a Canadian payer profile is configured.
onboarding.configuredPayersBody: Import rows should match these payer profiles exactly or by payer name.
onboarding.previewResultsBody: Tenio will only commit rows marked Create or Update.
onboarding.templateProfileHelp: Choose the closest source format before preview. The generic template is exact-match. Dentrix is a starter shell with header alias mapping, not a certified parser.
onboarding.profileGenericDescription: Exact header match for the Tenio CSV template.
onboarding.profileDentrixDescription: Starter alias mapping for dental-office exports and sample files.
onboarding.previewGeneratedNotice: Preview generated. Review skipped rows before committing.
onboarding.uploadRequiredError: Upload a CSV file before requesting a preview.
onboarding.previewRequiredError: Preview the file first. Tenio only commits rows marked Create or Update.
onboarding.previewFailedError: The import preview failed. Check the CSV format and try again.
onboarding.commitFailedError: The import commit failed. No backlog changes were applied.
